text.title: python-pytest-async Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for python-pytest-async. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Set asyncio_mode = "auto" in pyproject.toml [tool.pytest.ini_options] for projects where most tests are async. Do not mix asyncio_mode="auto" with explicit @pytest.mark.asyncio markers — the redundant markers are harmless but add noise. For projects with a small minority of async tests, use strict mode and mark only those tests.
rule.rationale: Flipping asyncio_mode breaks marker expectations silently — strict mode ignores unmarked async tests (the test body never runs, the test passes). auto mode is the right default for FastAPI projects; strict is appropriate for Django projects where most tests are sync.
